languages.text: Тлетворные идеи, порожденные манипулусом Фебрусом, глубоко укоренились среди флота Эксплораторов, прорастая в рядах служителей Омниссии бесчисленным количеством споров и междоусобиц. Все больше Адептус Механикус прельщались идеями ксенаритов, направляя свою бесконечную страсть к знаниям в русло изучения ксенотехнологий.

The pernicious ideas spawned by Manipulus Februs took deep root among the Explorator Fleet, sprouting countless disputes and strife within the ranks of the Omnissiah's servants. More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.
languages.original_text: Тлетворные идеи, порожденные манипулусом Фебрусом, глубоко укоренились среди флота Эксплораторов, прорастая в рядах служителей Омниссии бесчисленным количеством споров и междоусобиц. Все больше Адептус Механикус прельщались идеями ксенаритов, направляя свою бесконечную страсть к знаниям в русло изучения ксенотехнологий.

traits.locale_text: The pernicious ideas spawned by Manipulus Februs took deep root among the Explorator Fleet, sprouting countless disputes and strife within the ranks of the Omnissiah's servants. More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.

More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.

The pernicious ideas spawned by Manipulus Februs took deep root among the Explorator Feet, sprouting countless disputes and strife within the ranks of the Omnissiah's servants. More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.

The pernicious ideas spawned by Manipulus Februs took deep root among the Explorator Fleet, sprouting countless disputes and strife within the ranks of the Omnissiah's servants. More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.

languages.text: マニピュラス・フェブルスが産んだ有害な思想は、エクスプローター・フットの中で深く根を下ろした。オムニシアのしもべの階級 には、数え切れないほどの争いと争いが芽生えた。テクノロジーの研究に、知識への限りない情熱を注ぐようになった。
languages.original_text: The pernicious ideas spawned by Manipulus Februs took deep root among the Explorator Feet, sprouting countless disputes and strife within the ranks of the Omnissiah's servants. More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.

traits.locale_text: マニピュラス・フェブルスが産んだ有害な思想は、エクスプローター・フットの中で深く根を下ろした。オムニシアのしもべの ranks には、数え切れないほどの争いと争いが芽生えた。テクノロジーの研究に、知識への限りない情熱を注ぐようになった。

languages.text: 操纵者费布鲁斯散播的有害思想在开拓者舰队中深深扎根，在欧姆尼赛亚的仆人内部引发了无数的争端与冲突。越来越多的机械修会成员被异形科技派的哲学思想所诱惑，把他们对知识的无限热情转向了对异形科技的研究。
languages.original_text: The pernicious ideas spawned by Manipulus Februs took deep root among the Explorator Fleet, sprouting countless disputes and strife within the ranks of the Omnissiah's servants. More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.

traits.locale_text: 操纵者费布鲁斯散播的有害思想在开拓者舰队中深深扎根，在欧姆尼赛亚的仆人内部引发了无数的争端与冲突。越来越多的机械修会成员被异形科技派的哲学思想所诱惑，把他们对知识的无限热情转向了对异形科技的研究。

languages.text: Les idées pernicieuses propagées par le manipulus Februs s'ancrèrent au sein de la Flotte Explorator, déclenchant d'innombrables disputes et conflits dans les rangs de serviteurs de l'Omnimessie. De nombreux membres de l'Adeptus Mechanicus se laissèrent séduire les uns après les autres par la philosophie des xénarites et mirent leur passion sans bornes pour la connaissance au profit de l'étude de la xénotechnologie.
languages.original_text: The pernicious ideas spawned by Manipulus Februs took deep root among the Explorator Fleet, sprouting countless disputes and strife within the ranks of the Omnissiah's servants. More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.

traits.locale_text: Les idées pernicieuses propagées par le manipulus Februs s'ancrèrent au sein de la Flotte Explorator, déclenchant d'innombrables disputes et conflits dans les rangs de serviteurs de l'Omnimessie. De nombreux membres de l'Adeptus Mechanicus se laissèrent séduire les uns après les autres par la philosophie des xénarites et mirent leur passion sans bornes pour la connaissance au profit de l'étude de la xénotechnologie.

languages.text: Las ideas ponzoñosas del manipulus Februs arraigaron con fuerza en la Flota Exploradora, lo que desató innumerables disputas y conflictos entre las filas de los sirvientes del Omnissiah. Cada vez más miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus se veían seducidos por la filosofía xenarita, lo que redirigía su pasión ilimitada por el saber hacia el estudio de la xenotecnología.
languages.original_text: The pernicious ideas spawned by Manipulus Februs took deep root among the Explorator Fleet, sprouting countless disputes and strife within the ranks of the Omnissiah's servants. More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.

traits.locale_text: Las ideas ponzoñosas del manipulus Februs arraigaron con fuerza en la Flota Exploradora, lo que desató innumerables disputas y conflictos entre las filas de los sirvientes del Omnissiah. Cada vez más miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus se veían seducidos por la filosofía xenarita, lo que redirigía su pasión ilimitada por el saber hacia el estudio de la xenotecnología.

languages.text: Manipülus Februs'un ortaya çıkardığı zararlı fikirler, Keşiftör Filosu'nda kök saldı ve Hermesih'in hizmetkârlarının saflarında sayısız tartışmayla çekişmeyi filizlendirdi. Giderek daha fazla Adeptus Mechanicus mensubu, zenaritlerin felsefesince baştan çıkarıldı. İrfana olan sınırsız tutkularını zeno teknolojisi çalışmalarına yönlendirdiler.
languages.original_text: The pernicious ideas spawned by Manipulus Februs took deep root among the Explorator Fleet, sprouting countless disputes and strife within the ranks of the Omnissiah's servants. More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.

traits.locale_text: Manipülus Februs'un ortaya çıkardığı zararlı fikirler, Keşiftör Filosu'nda kök saldı ve Hermesih'in hizmetkârlarının saflarında sayısız tartışmayla çekişmeyi filizlendirdi. Giderek daha fazla Adeptus Mechanicus mensubu, zenaritlerin felsefesince baştan çıkarıldı. İrfana olan sınırsız tutkularını zeno teknolojisi çalışmalarına yönlendirdiler.

languages.text: Die gefährlichen Ideen, die Manipulus Februs verbreitet hatte, schlugen in der Exploratorflotte Wurzeln und ließen in den Reihen der Diener des Omnissiah zahlreiche Streitigkeiten sprießen. Immer mehr Mitglieder des Adeptus Mechanicus verfielen der Philosophie der Xenariten, die ihre grenzenlose Begeisterung für Wissen auf das Studium von Xenotech lenkten.

More and more members of the Adeptus Mechanicus were seduced by the xenarites' philosophy, redirecting their limitless passion for knowledge into the study of xenotechnology.
